from __future__ import annotations


def _active_users_query() -> str:
    return "SELECT id FROM users WHERE active = 1 AND deleted = 0"


def duplicate_query_fragment_positive() -> tuple[str, str]:
    one = "SELECT id FROM users WHERE active = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC"
    two = "SELECT id FROM users WHERE active = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC"
    return one, two
